summary: Admin Password Change and Audit Log Features - All Backend Tests PASSED, Frontend Working. Fixed issue where PASSWORD_CHANGED events weren't showing in auth-history.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Auth history query now includes PASSWORD_CHANGED events (entity_type was 'user' not 'auth')
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Password change creates audit log without storing password value
Logout endpoint creates appropriate USER_LOGOUT or ADMIN_LOGOUT based on role
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 2170-2183: fixed auth-history query to include user entity_type for PASSWORD_CHANGED)
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin password change and audit log features fully tested. Backend endpoints working: POST /admin/users/{id}/change-password, GET /admin/users/{id}/auth-history, POST /auth/logout. Frontend has password change modal with validation. Auth history now shows PASSWORD_CHANGED, LOGIN_SUCCESS, LOGOUT events.

backend_apis: POST /api/v1/admin/users/{user_id}/change-password - WORKING (changes password, creates audit log)
GET /api/v1/admin/users/{user_id}/auth-history - WORKING (returns all auth events including PASSWORD_CHANGED)
POST /api/v1/auth/logout - WORKING (creates USER_LOGOUT or ADMIN_LOGOUT audit log based on role)
POST /api/v1/auth/login - WORKING (creates USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS or ADMIN_LOGIN_SUCCESS based on role)
frontend_ui: Password Change modal - Opens correctly, shows customer info, warning message
Password validation - Passwords must match, minimum 8 characters enforced
View Login Activity button - Loads and displays auth history
Auth history shows PASSWORD_CHANGED, LOGIN_SUCCESS, USER_LOGOUT events
Success toast displays after password change
audit_log_events: ADMIN_LOGIN_SUCCESS - Created when admin logs in
ADMIN_LOGOUT - Created when admin logs out
USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS - Created when customer logs in
USER_LOGOUT - Created when customer logs out
PASSWORD_CHANGED - Created when admin changes customer password (includes IP, source, actor info)

bug_fixed.issue: PASSWORD_CHANGED events not appearing in auth-history API response
bug_fixed.root_cause: Auth history query filtered by entity_type='auth' but PASSWORD_CHANGED logs have entity_type='user'
bug_fixed.fix: Updated query to include both entity_type='auth' AND (entity_type='user' with PASSWORD_CHANGED/EMAIL_VERIFIED actions)
